mechanism: The basis trade suppresses term premium by 20-40bp in calm periods (through leveraged Treasury buying) and amplifies term premium in stress (through forced selling). Creates a bimodal distribution of term premium outcomes that feeds into credit-equity co-movement.
regime_dependence: Calm regime: basis trade suppresses term premium, compressing credit spreads. Stress regime: basis trade unwind amplifies term premium, widening credit. Transition is non-linear and potentially self-reinforcing.
